items.headline: Tour dates extended after sustained demand
items.summary: Official updates signaled another round of added dates, keeping attention elevated this week.
items.whyItMatters: Major live-event demand tends to reinforce short-term momentum.

items.headline: New production update renewed audience attention
items.summary: A verified trade report tied Zendaya to a fresh production milestone and pushed the story back into active coverage.
items.whyItMatters: Production milestones usually create a clean, understandable reason for momentum changes.
